Settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your profile, notifications and account.
Settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for Foilio. Your choice is saved on this device.
Settings.profileDesc: This is how you appear to other collectors.
Settings.nameMin: The name must be at least 2 characters.
Settings.notifDesc: Choose how you want to be alerted.
Settings.notifEmailHint: Price alerts and restocks via email.
Settings.notifAllHint: Get an alert when ANY sealed product comes back in stock — without watching it.
Settings.pushFailDesc: Allow notifications for Foilio in your device settings and try again.
Settings.planProDesc: You have Pro — thanks for supporting Foilio! Unlimited watches, all restocks and AI grading.
Settings.planFreeDesc: With Pro you get unlimited watches, all restocks, AI grading and full price history.
Settings.traderaConnectedDesc: Your Tradera account (id {id}) is connected. You can sell products from the scanner and your collection directly to Tradera.
Settings.traderaDisconnectedDesc: Connect your Tradera account to list cards and sealed products for sale directly from the scanner and your collection.
Settings.gdprDesc: Your data is yours. Export everything we have about you, or delete your account permanently.
Settings.deleteWarning: This deletes your account, your collection, your watches and all posts — permanently and irreversibly.

Meta.title: Foilio — Your control panel for the Pokémon TCG market
Meta.description: Track prices, stock status and the value of your collection. Foilio brings together price data, restock alerts and market trends for Pokémon TCG in Sweden.
Meta.ogDescription: Track prices, stock status and the value of your collection. Stay ahead of the market.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Log in to see your watches.

register.errName: The name must be at least 2 characters.
register.errPassword: The password must be at least 8 characters.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: No worries. Enter your email address and we'll send a link to reset it.
forgot.fallbackSuccess: If the account exists, we'll send a reset link.

reset.successOpenApp: Done! Open the Foilio app and log in with your new password.

reset.subtitle: Enter your new password below. At least 8 characters.
reset.errPassword: The password must be at least 8 characters.

verify.title: Confirm email address

verify.fallbackSuccess: Your email address is now confirmed.
verify.successOpenApp: Done! Open the Foilio app and log in with your account.
verify.errorOpenApp: Open the Foilio app and try again from there.

Watchlist.subtitle: We alert you on price drops, target prices and restocks — before everyone else.
Watchlist.emptyDesc: Add products to your watchlist and we'll let you know as soon as the price drops or stock is replenished.
Watchlist.noAlerts: No alerts have been triggered yet. When something happens, you'll find the history here.
Watchlist.editHint: We'll alert you when {title} costs at or below your target price. Leave blank to remove the target price.
Watchlist.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to stop watching {title}? You won't get any more alerts for this product.

Market.metaDescription: Market overview for Pokémon TCG in Sweden — trends, price drops, most watched products, restocks and a price index per set.
Market.intro: The state of the Swedish Pokémon TCG market right now — updated continuously.
Market.gainsEmpty: We need a few days of price data before gains show up here.
Market.dropsEmpty: We need a few days of price data before drops show up here.
Market.noWatchesDesc: Be the first — create a watch on your favorite product.
Market.noRestocksDesc: When a sold-out product comes back in stock, it shows up here.
Market.noIndexDesc: The price index per set appears once we've collected enough data.
Market.proTitle: Want to dig deeper into the data?
Market.proDesc: With Pro you get longer price history, advanced charts, weekly reports and all restock alerts — so you act before everyone else.

Products.metaDescription: Search and compare prices on Pokémon TCG products at Swedish stores. Filter by category, set, price and stock status.
Products.intro: Compare prices and stock status at Swedish stores — and watch what you don't want to miss.
Products.scanAria: Identify a card with the camera
Products.scanTitle: Scan a card with the camera
Products.resultFound: {count, plural, =1 {1 product found} other {# products found}}
Products.noMatchDesc: Try broadening your search or clearing the filters — the market keeps growing.

Sets.emptyProductsTitle: No products in this set yet

Detail.metaDescription: Compare prices on {title} ({category}) at Swedish stores. Lowest price right now: {price}. Track price and restock on Foilio.

Upgrade.manageSub: Manage or cancel in the App Store (Settings → your name → Subscriptions).
Upgrade.msgPurchasePending: Purchase went through — Pro activates shortly.

Pricing.metaDescription: Get started free with Foilio or upgrade to Pro for unlimited watches, all restock alerts and AI grading.
Pricing.subtitle: Get started free. Upgrade when you want full control of the market — cancel any time.
Pricing.freeTagline: For those who want to test the waters.
Pricing.proTagline: Full control of the market — before everyone else.
freeFeatures: 10 watches with price and restock alerts
5 AI gradings and 10 scans per day
Basic market data and price charts
premiumFeatures: All restocks — alerts for every sealed product
AI grading with a stronger model (30/day)
Advanced price charts and longer history

faqItems.q: Can I switch plans any time?
faqItems.a: Yes. You can upgrade or cancel Pro whenever you like, with no lock-in. The purchase is handled by the App Store / Google Play.

faqItems.q: What happens to my watches if I downgrade?
faqItems.a: Your watches are kept, but only the 10 most recent are active on the free tier. You choose which ones stay active.

faqItems.q: How do I pay for Pro?
faqItems.a: In the app the purchase is made securely via the App Store or Google Play. On the web, payment launches soon — until then the free tier is open to everyone.

hero.subtitle: Track prices, stock status and the value of your collection — all in one place, updated around the clock.

features.heading: Everything you need as a collector
features.sub: From price tracking to community — tools built for the Swedish market.

items.title: Price tracking & restock alerts
items.text: Set a target price or watch stock status. We notify you the moment something happens.

items.title: Collection value
items.text: Register your collection and see what it's worth — updated with current market data.

items.title: Market trends
items.text: Price index, trend curves and the biggest price drops — all at a glance.

items.title: Card scanning
items.text: Scan your cards with the camera and add them to your collection in seconds.

items.title: Community
items.text: Share pulls, discuss trades and follow other Swedish collectors.

items.title: Transparent price data
items.text: Every product page shows the source and last update. No hidden adjustments.

showcase.heading: Price history that gives you the edge
showcase.lead: See how prices move and buy when the timing is right. Here's <product>{name}</product> over the last 90 days.

items.a: Yes. With a free account you can track up to 10 products, manage a basic collection and access market data. Pro unlocks unlimited watches, all restock alerts, AI grading and advanced analytics.
We follow a growing number of Swedish Pokémon TCG retailers. The list keeps expanding — if a store is missing, feel free to get in touch.
Prices and stock status are collected continuously, several times a day. Each product page shows when the data was last updated.
You watch a product and enable a restock alert. As soon as we detect it's back in stock at any store, we send a notification — in the app and by email if you like.

cta.heading: Stay ahead of the market.
cta.sub: Create a free account and start tracking your favorite products today.
